per_criterion_scores.internal_note: Commands were somewhat vague and lacked specificity, particularly regarding the discount rate.
Some integration of feedback was evident, but lacked depth and specificity in areas like discount rate justification.
Some improvement was seen, but critical issues remained unaddressed, limiting full iterative refinement.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding with consistent 'B' scores across all criteria, indicating some clarity and integration but lacking depth and specificity.
